features: 5V 3A Power Supply Universal Compatibility & Multiple Tips - This 5V DC power adapter charger comes with 8 interchangeable tips, making it compatible with a wide range of devices such as 5Volt baby monitors, record players, LED strip lights, massage guns, and many other electronics requiring 5V power.

Stable & Adjustable Current Output - Features a stable DC 5V output with a maximum 3A current. It intelligently adjusts the current from 1A to 3A (3A, 2A, 1.5A, 1A) to match your device's requirements, ensuring safe and efficient operation without overloading.
Wide Input Voltage Range - Supports AC input from 100V to 240V at 50/60Hz, making it ideal for both domestic use and international travel. You can use it safely anywhere in the world.

High-Quality & Safe Design - Built with premium materials and advanced safety features including protection against over-current, over-voltage, and short circuits. Ensures reliable performance and longevity for your valuable devices.

Convenient & Versatile Use - The included 8 tips (5.5*2.5mm, 5.5 * 2.1mm, 4.0 * 1.7mm, 3.5 * 1.35mm 3.0*1.1mm 2.5*0.7mm Type C, Mini USB, Micro USB, LED Terminal) and wide compatibility make this power cord adapter a perfect replacement or spare for various home, office, or personal electronics, simplifying your power needs with one solution.

Cable Length: 1.5M/4.9 feet Color: Black Power DC Connector Size: 5.5 x 2.1 x 10 mm ( Center Positive, inside"+", outside"-") Warm Tips: 1. Please find the spec label of your device and check the working voltage. It should be 5V DC, not be AC 5V or lower/higher than 5V DC. Otherwise, your device will not work or be damaged. 2. Check the max current your device will draw. It should be equal to or less than 3A, such as 2.5A, 2.0A, 1.5A, 1.0A. Otherwise, your device won’t work well and the power supply will be damaged very soon. 3. Check the power input port of your device. Its outer diameter should be 5.5mm; inner core diameter should be 2.5mm or 2.1mm. Inner core polarity should be"+", exterior polarity should be" - ". 4. If you have a power supply for reference, their output voltage, plug size, polarity should be the same .If our current is equal to or higher than original one’s, then our will work with your device. 5. If you purchase the adapter charger and find that you cannot charge the battery, it may be that your battery's life has expired or is damaged.
